parties.name: PATIK, CRYSTAL ANN 2059 MARKET STREET #40 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Crystal Ann Patik was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication was filed today, February 24, 2009.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Kai Graham Augustine.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
